overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey Discovery Tour, exploring the Sanctuary of Apollo at Delphi. The player character walks through a sunlit ancient Greek courtyard with classical columns and market stalls, then enters the Hebdomon building to explore interior rooms adorned with detailed murals and scrolls.

events.description: moving past the burning hearth into the open plaza with columns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sanctuary courtyard, passing the smoking ceremonial hearth and tall fluted columns

notable_agents.action: vendor standing near the fruit cart, facing the plaza

entered.detail: large stone basin with burning fire and rising smoke
tall red and white striped stone columns with vertical grooves
large classical temple with Doric columns and stepped base
wooden market cart with baskets of fruits and vegetables

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beside a smoking ceremonial hearth in the Sanctuary of Apollo. The camera moves forward past tall fluted columns toward a distant temple facade, passing a vendor standing by a fruit cart. The stone pavement is sunlit and the area is sparsely populated with scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with scattered flower petals and market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit plaza, passing market stalls and scattered flower petals on the ground

notable_agents.action: vendor arranging goods at a fruit stall with baskets

entered.detail: red and pink flower petals scattered across the stone pavement
distant stone gate structure with hanging banners between columns
tall slender dark green cypress trees lining the plaza

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open plaza, the ground is covered with scattered flower petals. The camera passes market stalls with vendors and approaches a ceremonial gate in the distance. The Apollo temple remains visible to the left while tall cypress trees line the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance approach with reflecting pool

events.description: approaching the Hebdomon building entrance with stone steps and reflecting pool
entering the shadow cast by the building's entrance portico

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone steps of the Hebdomon temple, pausing to view the reflecting pool before entering

entered.detail: stone temple building with triangular pediment and lyre carvings above doorway
rectangular marble pool with still water reflecting the sky
vibrant purple flowering plants in large stone planters
wide stone staircase leading up to the dark interior doorway

segments.scene_description: The camera turns toward the Hebdomon building, approaching its stone steps and rectangular reflecting pool. Purple flowering bushes line the path. The scene transitions from bright sunlight to the shadow of the entrance portico as the camera moves toward the dark doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior temple rooms with murals and scrolls

events.description: entering the dark interior doorway into the Hebdomon building
moving deeper into interior rooms with reduced natural light

agents.ego_description: exploring the interior rooms, examining ancient wall murals, wooden lattice screens, and scrolls on tables

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing still near the wall murals

entered.detail: colorful wall paintings depicting mythological figures and boats in orange and black tones
decorative wooden partition with geometric diamond pattern
wooden table covered with scattered papyrus scrolls and writing materials
large blue and gold wall hanging with sun emblem and fringe
wooden grid window casting patterned light onto the floor

segments.scene_description: Inside the Hebdomon, the camera explores rooms with detailed ancient murals covering the walls. Sunlight filters through lattice windows, casting patterns on the marble floor. The space contains wooden screens, tables with scrolls, and a large Apollo tapestry. A robed figure stands near the wall paintings as the camera moves through the interconnected interior chambers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sun-drenched open courtyards of the Sanctuary of Apollo into the shaded, artistic interiors of the Hebdomon building. It begins beside a smoking ceremonial hearth, gliding past fluted columns and a fruit vendor across sunlit stone pavement toward a distant temple facade. As the camera moves through the open plaza, the terrain shifts to ground covered in scattered flower petals and lined with tall cypress trees, passing market stalls before turning toward the stone steps and reflecting pool of the Hebdomon. The scene then transitions from the bright exterior light into the cool shadow of the entrance portico, moving through a dark doorway to reveal interior chambers. Finally, the camera explores these rooms where sunlight filters through lattice windows onto marble floors, passing wooden screens, scrolls, and a large Apollo tapestry amidst detailed wall murals.
